text:
Yeah… it’s okay.
Just not my thing.

Battlefield 2042 works now. Gunplay is fine, content is there, and technically it’s no longer on life support. But the spark? Missing.

Specialists never really clicked for me. Matches feel chaotic in a weird way, not the good Battlefield kind. It’s playable, sometimes fun — but it never pulls me in like BF4 did.

I don’t hate it.
I just don’t care.

✅ Playable nowadays
✅ Decent gunplay
❌ Specialists still feel wrong
❌ No classic Battlefield soul

Final verdict:
6/10 – Fine game, just not for me.
This game has come a long way and it is an enjoyable experience at this point. Now if only they could get rid of the loading screens.
Vey fun and cute game! My daughter loved it so much <3

perfect game to humble anyone's ego skill in gaming , even when its already challenging in normal mode,expert makes it impeccably harder to an extent some people give up without trying. a game that actually requires time effort and practice to master the mechanics. one of few games that makes you put in your blood sweat and tears to grind and complete certain achievements/challenges.
